title: Goldsage
description: A modpack for players on the Goldsage Server, a faction-based server between contesting philosophies on the utilization of magic! Flesh, Magic, Metal, its all here.
body:
This modpack features a variety of mods intended to enhance to roleplay experience and some new mods that are not commonly included in modpacks. Such mods include:
Crossroads MC
Gaoty
Malum
Via Romana
Biomancy
and more!


Phantasmic / Netherific is a curseforge mod included which is being attributed here! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/netherific

We do not advise running this on a server as it still possesses many client side mods which will crash it! Please remove them before running.
